summary: Comprehensive testing of Aashwashan platform iteration 8 completed. All 14 requested features verified working: Hero rotating images, logo styling, Take Assessment navigation, Team page with 2 therapists (Prakhar & Sonali), therapist skills/credentials, dynamic pricing, 'We Are Human' section with white bg and colored text, tagline, 'How It Works' 4-step timeline, 'Why Aashwashan' emotional cards, Self-Assessment with credits/disclaimer, and AI Chatbot (Aasha) with real OpenAI integration.

backend_api_tests.details: 14/14 backend tests passed: API health, status, chatbot session creation, chatbot chat, appointments CRUD, contacts, therapists, auth, community posts, blogs

hero_rotating_images.details: 5 rotating background images found in hero section

navbar_logo_styling.details: Logo uses gradient/teal background with rounded-full styling, no white box/reflection

take_assessment_button.details: 'Take Assessment' button in navbar navigates to /self-assessment

team_page_therapists.details: Only 2 therapists displayed: Prakhar Tiwari and Sonali Mishra. Shweta Bramhankar correctly removed.

prakhar_profile.details: Skills: Empathy, Grief, Active Listening, Career Problems. APA membership mentioned. 1+ years experience.

sonali_profile.details: Skills: Stress Management, Relationship Issues, Self-Esteem, Anxiety. 3+ years experience displayed.

dynamic_pricing.details: Prakhar: ₹999/45min, ₹1249/60min. Sonali: ₹1499/45min, ₹1899/60min. Pricing shown in booking modal.

we_are_human_section.details: White background with colored text (teal 'Human', cyan 'You', orange 'people'). Quote and philosophy displayed.

tagline.details: 'Aashwashan is of the people, by the people, for the people' with colored text visible on homepage

how_it_works_timeline.details: 4-step professional timeline: Recognize, Connect, Match, Transform

why_aashwashan_cards.details: Emotional cards present: 'We See You as a Person, Not a Patient', 'We're Here Between Sessions Too'

self_assessment_credits.details: 'Assessment Credits & Sources' section found with PHQ-9 (Spitzer/Pfizer), GAD-7, DASS-21, K6, PSS, WHO-5 credits

self_assessment_disclaimer.details: 'Important Legal Disclaimer' with crisis helpline (Tele MANAS: 14416) prominently displayed

ai_chatbot_toggle.details: Chatbot toggle button opens Aasha chatbot window successfully

ai_chatbot_greeting.details: Initial greeting: 'Hi! I'm Aasha, your wellness companion at Aashwashan'

ai_chatbot_response.details: AI chatbot responds to messages with empathetic, relevant responses using real OpenAI GPT-4o-mini API

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working correctly: 1) AI Chatbot 'Aasha' using real OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM Key - responds to user messages with compassionate mental health support 2) Team page shows 2 therapists (Prakhar Tiwari & Sonali Mishra) with dynamic pricing per therapist 3) 'We Are Human' section redesigned with white bg and colored text 4) Tagline visible on homepage 5) Self-assessment has credits and legal disclaimer with crisis helpline 6) 'How It Works' professional 4-step timeline 7) 'Why Aashwashan' emotional cards. No mocked APIs - chatbot uses real OpenAI integration.

mocked_apis.notes: AI Chatbot uses real OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM Key
